description_long: This rifle features a long, black barrel with a series of vent holes along its length, suggesting a heavy or precision design. The stock is skeletonized and constructed from a wood-textured material, providing both reduced weight and a distinctive appearance. A large optical scope is mounted on the top rail, indicating the rifle is intended for long-range accuracy. The receiver and magazine area are robust, with visible mechanical details and a detachable box magazine. The fore-end includes a tactical accessory rail and a mounted device, likely a bipod or flashlight. The muzzle is fitted with a cylindrical suppressor, further enhancing its suitability for stealth or precision shooting in urban environments.
description: A precision rifle with a long, vented barrel, skeletonized wooden stock, mounted scope, and suppressor, designed for long-range accuracy and tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, skeletonized wooden stock, mounted scope, and suppressor.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle with suppressor and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and scope visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
